hero.title: LDN Dashboard
hero.subtitle: Land Degradation & SDG 15.3.1's indicators
hero.description: Monitor land degradation indicators in Africa using interactive dashboards. Track SDG Indicator 15.3.1, explore trends, and analyze Land Degradation Neutrality progress.

about.paragraph1: The Dashboard provides interactive data visualization tools for land degradation monitoring in Africa, enabling users to explore, analyze, and interpret key indicators related to Land Degradation Neutrality (LDN) and SDG 15.3.1.
about.paragraph2: It allows users to visualize thematic resources aligned with the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (UNCCD)'s five Strategic Objectives (SOs), offering a structured and policy-relevant perspective on land degradation dynamics.
about.paragraph3: Through dynamic charts, graphs, and comparative tools, the Dashboard supports evidence-based analysis and decision-making at continental, regional, and national levels.

keyIndicators.heading: Key Indicators
keyIndicators.description: Core indicators distributed according to the UNCCD's Strategic Objectives, used to monitor land degradation and support LDN reporting

so1.title: SO1 — Ecosystems
so1.subtitle: Improving affected ecosystems and promoting sustainable land management
so1.indicator2: Trends in land productivity or functioning of the land
so1.indicator3: Trends in carbon stocks above and below ground
so1.indicator4: Proportion of land that is degraded over total land area (SDG indicator 15.3.1)

so2.title: SO2 — Populations
so2.subtitle: Enhancing the living conditions of affected populations
so2.indicator1: Trends in population living below the relative poverty line or income inequality in affected areas
so2.indicator2: Trends in access to safe drinking water in affected areas
so2.indicator3: Trends in the Proportion of the population exposed to LD disaggregated by Sex

so3.title: SO3 — Drought
so3.subtitle: Mitigating drought effects to increase resilience
so3.indicator1: Trends in the proportion of land under drought over the total land area
so3.indicator2: Trends in the proportion of the population exposed to drought
so3.indicator3: Trends in the degree of drought vulnerability

so4.title: SO4 — Environmental Benefits
so4.subtitle: Generating global environmental benefits through implementation
so4.indicator1: Trends in carbon stocks above and below ground
so4.indicator2: Trends in abundance and distribution of selected species
so4.indicator3: Trends in protected area coverage of important biodiversity areas

capabilities.heading: Dashboard Capabilities
capabilities.description: Powerful tools to explore, analyze, and interpret land degradation data
capabilities.cap4: Interactive charts and graphs for deeper data exploration
capabilities.cap5: Thematic views aligned with UNCCD Strategic Objectives (SOs)

whyMatters.heading: Why the Dashboard Matters
whyMatters.description: The Dashboard transforms complex datasets into clear and interactive visual insights
whyMatters.item1: Understand land degradation trends and patterns over time
whyMatters.item2: Monitor progress toward Land Degradation Neutrality through SDG 15.3.1
whyMatters.item4: Generate custom visualizations to facilitate data-driven decision-making
